aces_jacket.description: A test pilot's jacket, ferried up as personal effects and never claimed. The name tape has been unpicked — by whom, the moon isn't saying.

aerogel_leggings.description: Apollo-issue underlayer, rated for the two-hundred-degree swing between lunar noon and the shadow of a crater. Cozy, in an existential way.

apollo_visor.description: A gold mirror bubble off an Apollo helmet. It has looked at the thing beneath the dust and shown it nothing but its own reflection.

artemis_visor.description: A gold mirror bubble off an Apollo helmet. It has looked at the thing beneath the dust and shown it nothing but its own reflection.
artemis_visor.name: ARTEMIS VISOR

assault_helmet.description: From the security desk's just-in-case locker. HQ never feared a riot from outside — the gear was sized for the day the laid-off workforce came back.

bag.description: The plainest carry-all — groceries, engine parts, and now loot. Ada sewed the strap back on once, with fishing line, and it has outlived three zippers.

bottomless_carafe.description: GERALD DEPARDIEU's carafe, which refills itself, always with something stronger. He acted his way out of every scene he ever wanted out of; the trick is in the pour.

bulwark_exoplate.description: The colony's premium defense line, MOSQUE-branded. The logo adds nothing ballistic, but it tests very well.

carbon_leggings.description: Filament-wound carbon legs off the fabricator line, lighter than the paperwork that approved them.

ceramic_shell.description: A colony-printed torso shell nobody remembers ordering — the fabricators simply started making them when the casualties started.

spur_jet_boots.name: SPUR-JET BOOTS

stardust_charm.description: A sliver of rift glitter in a bottle. It fell from between universes and has not decided which one it belongs to. Holding it, briefly, neither have you.
stardust_charm.name: STARDUST CHARM

steel_toe_boots.description: Shipping-floor boots, rated for dropped engine parts. The line went to the robots; the boots still fit the man the line was taken from.
steel_toe_boots.name: STEEL-TOE BOOTS

stormwall_duster.description: A long duster over an exo-frame, cut to flap dramatically at high noon. The drama is scheduled. The armor underneath is sincere.
stormwall_duster.name: STORMWALL DUSTER

synaptic_visor.description: A fembot-line diagnostic visor that reads intent off the wearer's synapses. It was built to make the colony's machines more attentive. It listens very well.
synaptic_visor.name: SYNAPTIC VISOR

t_shirt.description: Movie-night uniform: soft, faded, printed with a band Ada never liked. It stops exactly none of anything, but it smells like home.
t_shirt.name: T-SHIRT

tactical_pants.description: Engineering issue with eleven pockets, each one load-rated. Half the parts catalog crossed this campus a pocket at a time, back when people still worked here.
tactical_pants.name: TACTICAL PANTS

tactical_vest.description: Security-desk issue. An American space company arms its guards properly: the vest has stopped two rounds, both fired indoors, both hushed up.
tactical_vest.name: TACTICAL VEST

targeting_monocle.description: A colony fabricator's aiming aid: it paints trajectories straight onto the eye and disapproves, quietly, of where you choose to point.
targeting_monocle.name: TARGETING MONOCLE

templars_helm.description: A crusader's helm whose owner took a wrong turn outside Acre and kept riding. The visor has been down for eight hundred years.
templars_helm.name: TEMPLAR'S HELM

thermal_leggings.description: Apollo-issue underlayer, rated for the two-hundred-degree swing between lunar noon and the shadow of a crater. Cozy, in an existential way.
thermal_leggings.name: THERMAL LEGGINGS

thruster_spurs.description: Boots with thrusters where the spurs should be, built for the stunt hosts' scripted getaways. The scripts never planned for anyone actually needing one.
thruster_spurs.name: THRUSTER SPURS

tigulated_mail.description: Ten thousand hand-riveted rings, one missing owner. Chainmail was the best armor of its millennium, and the millennium is in here somewhere too.
tigulated_mail.name: TIGULATED MAIL

tin_star_cuirass.description: A breastplate stamped like a sheriff's star, sized for the law-enforcement hosts. In PUTAIN's park the law always wins — that is why he built the park.
tin_star_cuirass.name: TIN STAR CUIRASS

titanium_hard_hat.description: Shipping-floor issue, box-cutter country. Compliance outlived the workforce: the robots wear nothing, and the racks still say HARD HAT AREA.
titanium_hard_hat.name: TITANIUM HARD HAT

titanium_toe_boots.description: Shipping-floor boots, rated for dropped engine parts. The line went to the robots; the boots still fit the man the line was taken from.
titanium_toe_boots.name: TITANIUM-TOE BOOTS

tranquility_boots.description: Heavy crater-tread boots off the lander racks. Every step on the moon is history; some of the steps up here were somebody's last.
tranquility_boots.name: TRANQUILITY BOOTS

vacheron_kremlinton.description: A VACHERON KREMLINTON from PUTAIN's drawer, engraved to a friendship history has since redacted. The gold is real; the friendship was also gold.
vacheron_kremlinton.name: VACHERON KREMLINTON

varsity_cap.description: The company softball team's cap. Morale mandatory, protection minimal — the AI that took everyone's jobs kept the league running, for culture.
varsity_cap.name: VARSITY CAP

viking_helm.description: A raider's helm — no horns, the real thing — off a longship that rowed into a fog bank in 870 and out of the sagas. The rift collects the lost, gear and all.
viking_helm.name: VIKING HELM

voidgrip_soles.description: Micro-setae soles printed for hull work: they grip anything, in any gravity. The colony AI adapted the design from an Earth lizard. It liked lizards, it turned out.
voidgrip_soles.name: VOID-GRIP SOLES

welding_mask.description: A spare face from the fab shop where the hero once welded engines. Sparks bounce; so do teeth. It still fits, after everything.
welding_mask.name: WELDING MASK

whipple_vest.description: Layered Whipple weave off a 70s lander, built to stop grains moving at orbital speed. Fists and claws move slower; the vest is politely unimpressed.
whipple_vest.name: WHIPPLE VEST

wyrmscale_cloak.description: Scaled hide off something heraldry insists is mythical. In a place stocked by every legend that ever went missing, the scales are uncomfortably warm.
wyrmscale_cloak.name: WYRMSCALE CLOAK

achillean_plate.lore: FORGED ON OLYMPUS, PROOF AGAINST ALL. THE FLAW WAS NEVER IN THE ARMOR.
achillean_plate.name: ACHILLEAN PLATE

adas_beacon.lore: THE TRACKING BEACON FROM HER JACKET. IT STILL POINTS HOME.
adas_beacon.name: ADA'S BEACON

adas_satchel.lore: YOU SEWED THE BEACON INTO A BAG LIKE THIS. IT SMELLS LIKE MOVIE NIGHT.
adas_satchel.name: ADA'S SATCHEL

aegishjalmr.lore: BETWEEN THE EYES, THE SIGN OF AWE. ALL WHO LOOK UPON IT FORGET THEIR COURAGE.
aegishjalmr.name: ÆGISHJÁLMR

architects_chip.lore: HE OPERATED IT INTO HIMSELF. IT STILL REMEMBERS HOW TO BUILD MINDS.
architects_chip.name: ARCHITECT'S CHIP

babr_e_bayan.lore: NEITHER FLAME NOR FLOOD NOR BLADE MARKED IT. THE HERO WORE THE RIVER'S HIDE.
babr_e_bayan.name: BABR-E BAYAN

burrow_greaves.lore: LEGS TUNED FOR THE ZOOMIES. YOU NEVER QUITE STOP MOVING.
burrow_greaves.name: ZOOMIE GREAVES

colossus_plate.lore: CUT FOR THE MACHINES THAT RAISED MOUNTAINS. IT DOES NOT MOVE FOR LESS.
colossus_plate.name: COLOSSUS PLATE

cornucopia.lore: THE HORN THAT BROKE FROM THE GOAT THAT SUCKLED A GOD. IT HAS NEVER RUN DRY.
cornucopia.name: CORNUCOPIA

crown_of_ruin.lore: WHOEVER WORE IT LAST RULED SOMETHING. NOTHING OF IT REMAINS TO RULE.
crown_of_ruin.name: CROWN OF RUIN

deadsprint.lore: THE FASTER YOU RUN, THE LESS OF YOU ARRIVES.
deadsprint.name: DEADSPRINT

deadstar.lore: THE HEART OF A STAR THAT DIED SCREAMING. IT STILL KEEPS TIME.
deadstar.name: DEADSTAR

dragons_breath.lore: A MOUTHFUL OF FIRE FROM SOMETHING THAT NEVER EXISTED. THE BURNS EXIST.
dragons_breath.name: DRAGON'S BREATH

draupnir.lore: EVERY NINTH NIGHT, EIGHT MORE. THE GOD OF THE HANGED NEVER WANTED FOR GOLD.
draupnir.name: DRAUPNIR

durendal.lore: IT DID NOT BREAK ON THE STONE. THE STONE BROKE.
durendal.name: DURENDAL

dust_of_tranquility.lore: GREY SAND FROM THE FIRST FOOTPRINT. IT HUMS, FAINTLY.
dust_of_tranquility.name: DUST OF TRANQUILITY

dustborn.lore: BORN OF THE WIND THAT BURIES EVERYTHING THAT STOPS MOVING.
dustborn.name: DUSTBORN

earthfast.lore: WHEREVER THEY STAND IS, FOR THE MOMENT, EARTH.
earthfast.name: EARTHFAST

emberheart.lore: A HEART THAT NEVER COOLED. IT BEATS IN FIRE, FOR WHOEVER CARRIES IT.
emberheart.name: EMBERHEART

escapists_tread.lore: THERE IS ALWAYS ANOTHER DOOR, AND HE IS ALWAYS ALREADY THROUGH IT.
escapists_tread.name: ESCAPIST'S TREAD

excalibur.lore: DRAWN FROM A STONE THAT IS NOW A SINGULARITY.
excalibur.name: EXCALIBUR

exiles_stride.lore: PACKED LIGHT. LEFT IN A HURRY.
exiles_stride.name: EXILE'S STRIDE

fail_not.lore: IT HAS LOOSED TEN THOUSAND ARROWS. NONE HAVE LANDED ANYWHERE BUT HOME.
fail_not.name: FAIL-NOT

falconmail.lore: CUT FOR THE DIVE. WHAT IT GIVES UP IN WEIGHT IT TAKES BACK IN SPEED.
falconmail.name: FALCONMAIL

foremans_duffel.lore: A WHOLE BENCH ON A STRAP. HE NEVER CLOCKED OUT EITHER.
foremans_duffel.name: FOREMAN'S DUFFEL

gandiva.lore: THE QUIVER NEVER EMPTIED. NEITHER, IN THE END, DID THE FIELD OF THE DEAD.
gandiva.name: GÁNDIVA

gilded_carapace.lore: MORE LOGO THAN PLATE. THE LOGO TESTS VERY WELL.
gilded_carapace.name: GILDED CARAPACE

gleipnir_chausses.lore: SOFT AS SILK, AND NOTHING HAS EVER TORN IT. NOT EVEN THE WOLF.
gleipnir_chausses.name: GLEIPNIR CHAUSSES

gnawed_sabatons.lore: RESTLESS ROBOT PAWS. THEY FIND THE SHINY COINS FIRST.
gnawed_sabatons.name: GOODBOY SABATONS

golden_fleece.lore: KINGS SENT ARMIES FOR IT. IT ONLY EVER WANTED SOMETHING WARM TO KEEP.
golden_fleece.name: GOLDEN FLEECE

gorgonscale.lore: IT TURNED ARMIES TO STONE. IT WILL SETTLE FOR STOPPING A BLOW.
gorgonscale.name: GORGONSCALE

gram.lore: IT WAS BROKEN ONCE, AND REMADE HUNGRIER. IT REMEMBERS THE DRAGON.
gram.name: GRAM

gravemaker.lore: WHAT IT FELLS STAYS FELLED. THE GROUND REMEMBERS EVERY BLOW.
gravemaker.name: GRAVEMAKER

helm_of_darkness.lore: THE HELM OF THE UNSEEN LORD. WHAT WEARS IT IS NOT THERE TO BE STRUCK.
helm_of_darkness.name: HELM OF DARKNESS

herdbreaker.lore: IT BRANDED A THOUSAND HEAD. NONE OF THEM WERE CATTLE.
herdbreaker.name: HERDBREAKER

honorary_black_belt.lore: AWARDED, NEVER EARNED. THE BELT DOES NOT KNOW THAT. NEITHER DO YOUR OPPONENTS.
honorary_black_belt.name: HONORARY BLACK BELT

hordebane.lore: IT WAS MADE FOR TOO MANY. THERE HAVE NEVER BEEN TOO MANY.
hordebane.name: HORDEBANE

horizons_end.lore: NOTHING ON THIS SIDE OF THE HORIZON IS OUT OF ITS REACH.
horizons_end.name: HORIZON'S END

huntsmans_cowl.lore: THE HUNTRESS OF THE OLD MOON WORE IT. NOTHING SHE MARKED OUTRAN THE NIGHT.
huntsmans_cowl.name: HUNTSMAN'S COWL

ironroot_greaves.lore: STAND WHERE THEY ARE PLANTED AND NOTHING MOVES YOU. NOTHING HAS.
ironroot_greaves.name: IRONROOT GREAVES

jotunn_greaves.lore: MADE FOR LEGS THAT STEP OVER MOUNTAINS. THEY FIT YOU. GROW INTO THEM.
jotunn_greaves.name: JÖTUNN GREAVES

kingsbane.lore: CROWNS DO NOT STOP IT. CROWNS NEVER HAVE.
kingsbane.name: KINGSBANE

lawless_stride.lore: NO REGULATORS OUT HERE. NO PADDING EITHER.
lawless_stride.name: LAWLESS STRIDE

lightbinder.lore: LIGHT OBEYS IT. LIGHT DID NOT GET A CHOICE.
lightbinder.name: LIGHTBINDER

longwatch.lore: THE WATCH ENDS WHEN THE MARK FALLS. THE WATCH HAS NOT ENDED.
longwatch.name: LONGWATCH

maelstrom.lore: THE WHOLE STORM, THROUGH ONE NARROW DOOR.
maelstrom.name: MAELSTROM

marecrest.lore: CROWNED FOR A SEA WITH NO WATER. NOTHING HAS STIRRED IT IN AN AGE.
marecrest.name: MARECREST

marewalkers.lore: NAMED FOR THE GREY SEAS. NOTHING HAS CROSSED THEM SINCE.
marewalkers.name: MAREWALKERS

megingjord.lore: THE STRONGEST THING ALIVE BUCKLED IT ON WHEN HE NEEDED TO BE STRONGER.
megingjord.name: MEGINGJÖRÐ

meteorfall.lore: IT DOES NOT FIRE ROUNDS. IT SCHEDULES IMPACTS.
meteorfall.name: METEORFALL

mjolnir.lore: ONLY THE WORTHY LIFT IT. OUT HERE, WORTHY MEANS STILL BREATHING.
mjolnir.name: MJÖLNIR

muramasa.lore: IT DEMANDS BLOOD. IT DOES NOT CARE WHOSE. USUALLY IT IS SATISFIED.
muramasa.name: MURAMASA

muskrats_tooth.lore: A CHROME CANINE PRIED FROM DOGE-1'S JAW, STILL WARM FROM THE CORE.
muskrats_tooth.name: DOGE'S FANG

nightfall.lore: QUENCHED IN THE DARK BETWEEN UNIVERSES. IT NEVER QUITE CAME BACK OUT.
nightfall.name: NIGHTFALL

oathbrand.lore: SWORN TO AN EDGE ONE MOLECULE WIDE. IT HAS NEVER BEEN FORSWORN.
oathbrand.name: OATHBRAND

omensight.lore: IT SHOWS WHAT COMES NEXT. IT DOES NOT SHOW HOW TO STOP IT.
omensight.name: OMENSIGHT

ovation_striders.lore: BUILT FOR THE WALK-ON. HE NEVER PLANNED A WALK-OFF.
ovation_striders.name: OVATION STRIDERS

pale_rider.lore: I LOOKED, AND BEHELD A PALE HORSE. HELL FOLLOWED AT A CANTER.
pale_rider.name: PALE RIDER

palegrave.lore: HALF IN THE GROUND. BLOWS FIND ONLY THE PARTS OF HIM THAT LEFT.
palegrave.name: PALEGRAVE

putains_tracksuit.lore: STRIPES DOWN THE ARMS. AUTHORITY DOWN THE SPINE. RUNS FROM NOTHING, OFFICIALLY.
putains_tracksuit.name: PUTAIN'S TRACKSUIT

pyrelight.lore: LIT ONCE AND NEVER SINCE PUT OUT. IT REMEMBERS BEING A STAR.
pyrelight.name: PYRELIGHT

redwind.lore: IT DRINKS THE RED STORM AND SPITS IT BACK, HOTTER.
redwind.name: REDWIND

regolith_rucksack.lore: PACKED FOR A LONG WALK ACROSS SOMEWHERE THAT WANTS YOU DEAD.
regolith_rucksack.name: REGOLITH RUCKSACK

riftmaw.lore: THE PHYSICS ARE — ON THE RECORD — FLEXIBLE.
riftmaw.name: RIFTMAW

riftshard.lore: A SLIVER OF THE TEAR BETWEEN UNIVERSES. IT CUTS BOTH WAYS.
riftshard.name: RIFTSHARD

ruyi_jingu.lore: AS-YOU-WISH. IT WEIGHED NOTHING, OR IT HELD UP HEAVEN. THE BEARER DECIDED.
ruyi_jingu.name: RUYI JINGU

sampo.lore: IT GROUND OUT WHATEVER WAS ASKED. THREE PEOPLES WENT TO WAR TO OWN IT.
sampo.name: SAMPO

seidr_staff.lore: SHE SANG THE FATES A LITTLE SLOWER. THEY DID NOT NOTICE UNTIL TOO LATE.
seidr_staff.name: SEIÐR STAFF

sentinels_greaves.lore: THEY STILL KNOW HOW A MAN MOVES WHERE A MAN WEIGHS NOTHING.
sentinels_greaves.name: SENTINEL'S GREAVES

sharanga.lore: THE BOW OF THE PRESERVER. IT ENDS THINGS SO OTHER THINGS MAY GO ON.
sharanga.name: SHARANGA

skybreaker.lore: EVERY SHOT TEARS THE SKY, AND THE SKY ANSWERS.
skybreaker.name: SKYBREAKER

sleipnirs_shoes.lore: EIGHT LEGS, NINE WORLDS, ONE NIGHT. THE GREY HORSE NEVER TIRED.
sleipnirs_shoes.name: SLEIPNIR'S SHOES

starfall.lore: EVERY FALLEN FOE PULLS A PIECE OF THE SKY DOWN WITH IT.
starfall.name: STARFALL

starforge_plate.lore: HAMMERED WHERE STARS ARE STRUCK. IT STILL HOLDS THE HEAT.
starforge_plate.name: STARFORGE PLATE

starsight.lore: IT SEES BY LIGHT THAT LEFT ITS STAR BEFORE ANYTHING HERE HAD EYES.
starsight.name: STARSIGHT

stormlash.lore: THE STORM, BROKEN TO HARNESS. IT STILL PULLS.
stormlash.name: STORMLASH

sunwreath.lore: THE CROWN OF A STAR THAT REFUSED TO DIE. IT BURNS FOR ITS BEARER NOW.
sunwreath.name: SUNWREATH

tarnhelm.lore: PUT IT ON AND BE ELSEWHERE. THE BLOW FALLS WHERE YOU WERE STANDING.
tarnhelm.name: TARNHELM

the_anvil.lore: EVERYTHING BREAKS ON IT. THAT IS WHAT IT IS FOR.
the_anvil.name: THE ANVIL

the_bulwark.lore: THE LINE HAS NOT BROKEN. IT HAS NOT EVEN BENT.
the_bulwark.name: THE BULWARK

the_buyout.lore: HOWEVER IT ENDS, HE LANDS SOFT, ON A PILE OF SOMEONE ELSE'S MONEY.
the_buyout.name: THE BUYOUT

the_ember_hour.lore: THE HOUR THE RED WORLD BURNS HOTTEST. IT NEVER QUITE ENDS.
the_ember_hour.name: THE EMBER HOUR

the_fallen_standard.lore: HE PLANTED IT AND STOOD WATCH BENEATH IT. TAKE IT UP.
the_fallen_standard.name: THE FALLEN STANDARD

the_far_shore.lore: EVERY STEP LANDS SOMEWHERE THAT HAS NEVER HELD A FOOT.
the_far_shore.name: THE FAR SHORE

the_first_draft.lore: THE CORE WROTE ITS FIRST DRAFT. IT REWROTE EVERYTHING AFTER.
the_first_draft.name: THE FIRST DRAFT

the_fixed_star.lore: NIGHTFALL DROPS. STARFALL DROPS. THIS ONE NEVER HAS.
the_fixed_star.name: THE FIXED STAR

the_hoard.lore: EVERY COIN IT EVER MINTED, AND IT MINTED EVERYTHING.
the_hoard.name: THE HOARD

the_immovable.lore: IT HAS NEVER TAKEN A STEP BACK. IT RARELY TAKES ONE FORWARD.
the_immovable.name: THE IMMOVABLE

the_inevitable.lore: EVERY SHOT IT EVER FIRED IS STILL ON ITS WAY TO SOMETHING.
the_inevitable.name: THE INEVITABLE

the_kings_ransom.lore: ENOUGH TO BUY BACK A CROWN. THE CROWN WAS NEVER WORTH IT.
the_kings_ransom.name: THE KING'S RANSOM

the_kremlin_ushanka.lore: WARM EARS, COLD DECISIONS. THE FUR REMEMBERS EVERY WINTER IT OUTLASTED.
the_kremlin_ushanka.name: THE KREMLIN USHANKA

the_last_ante.lore: EVERYTHING ON ONE CARD. THE HOUSE COULD NOT COVER THE CALL.
the_last_ante.name: THE LAST ANTE

the_last_roundup.lore: ONE THROW TOOK THE WHOLE HERD. THE HERD DID NOT GET UP.
the_last_roundup.name: THE LAST ROUNDUP

the_last_word.lore: IT HAS ALREADY DECIDED WHAT YOU WERE GOING TO SAY.
the_last_word.name: THE LAST WORD

the_long_march.lore: THEY HAVE WALKED FARTHER THAN THE WAR THAT MADE THEM.
the_long_march.name: THE LONG MARCH

the_long_silence.lore: AFTER IT SPEAKS, NOTHING ELSE DOES.
the_long_silence.name: THE LONG SILENCE

the_long_vigil.lore: THE GOLD VISOR NEVER ONCE CLOSED ON THE THING BENEATH THE DUST.
the_long_vigil.name: THE LONG VIGIL

the_motherlode.lore: EVERY PROSPECTOR ON MARS DIED LOOKING FOR IT. YOU TRIPPED OVER IT.
the_motherlode.name: THE MOTHERLODE

the_pale_covenant.lore: SEALED AGAINST A SILENCE THAT EATS EVERYTHING IT TOUCHES.
the_pale_covenant.name: THE PALE COVENANT

the_panopticon.lore: IT HOLDS THE WHOLE BATTLEFIELD AT ONCE. BRIEFLY.
the_panopticon.name: THE PANOPTICON

the_pilgrim_star.lore: IT POINTS NOWHERE YOU KNOW. IT HAS NEVER ONCE POINTED WRONG.
the_pilgrim_star.name: THE PILGRIM STAR

the_reckoning.lore: EVERY DEBT COMES DUE. THIS IS HOW.
the_reckoning.name: THE RECKONING

the_redacted.lore: WHAT IT GUARDS, IT WILL NOT DISCLOSE.
the_redacted.name: THE REDACTED

the_severance.lore: EVERYTHING THEY OWED THE ONES THEY LAID OFF. PAID OUT AT LAST.
the_severance.name: THE SEVERANCE

the_signal_crown.lore: IT DECIDES WHAT YOU SEE. IT DECIDED YOU SHOULD SEE THIS.
the_signal_crown.name: THE SIGNAL CROWN

the_still_point.lore: EVERYTHING IN HERE DRIFTS. HOLD THIS, AND YOU DO NOT.
the_still_point.name: THE STILL POINT

the_stillward.lore: THE GREAT STILLNESS, CUT TO FIT. THE WORLD SLOWS TO MATCH IT.
the_stillward.name: THE STILLWARD

the_trinity_shard.lore: GREEN GLASS, BORN THE INSTANT THE SKY FIRST BURNED.
the_trinity_shard.name: THE TRINITY SHARD

the_verdict.lore: IT HEARS BOTH SIDES. THEN IT RULES.
the_verdict.name: THE VERDICT

the_worldshell.lore: A DEAD WORLD'S CRUST, CUT TO FIT A LIVING BACK.
the_worldshell.name: THE WORLDSHELL

thyrsus.lore: PINE-CROWNED, VINE-WOUND. WHAT IT TOUCHES REMEMBERS IT WAS ONCE ON FIRE.
thyrsus.name: THYRSUS

titanstride.lore: LEGS FROM A FRAME THAT CARRIED MOUNTAINS. THEY HAVE NOT NOTICED YOU YET.
titanstride.name: TITANSTRIDE

truthseeker.lore: IT WILL TELL YOU PRECISELY WHERE IT HURTS.
truthseeker.name: TRUTHSEEKER

veilwalkers.lore: THEY CROSS THE FLOOR THE WAY NIGHT CROSSES IT. NOTHING HEARS.
veilwalkers.name: VEILWALKERS

vermin_pelt.lore: DENTED CREAM PLATING. SHRUGS A BLOW; STOPS NOTHING CLEAN.
vermin_pelt.name: SHIBA PLATING

vidarrs_boot.lore: SAVED FROM EVERY COBBLER'S SCRAP FOR THIS ONE STEP ONTO THE WOLF'S JAW.
vidarrs_boot.name: VÍÐARR'S BOOT

voidcache.lore: IT HOLDS MORE THAN IT SHOULD. DON'T LOOK TOO LONG INSIDE.
voidcache.name: VOIDCACHE

walled_garden.lore: INSIDE, EVERYTHING WORKS, FOREVER. YOU WILL NOT BE LEAVING.
walled_garden.name: GREAVES OF THE WALLED GARDEN

whiskerweave_hood.lore: DOGE-1'S ANTENNA EARS. YOU HEAR THE WHOLE FLOOR BREATHE.
whiskerweave_hood.name: SATELLITE EARS

windgrave.lore: THE WIND CHASED THE RIDER. HERE IS WHERE THE WIND GAVE UP.
windgrave.name: WINDGRAVE

windrunners.lore: THE WIND SET OUT TO RACE THEM. THE WIND IS STILL RUNNING.
windrunners.name: WINDRUNNERS

wishbane.lore: IT GRANTS EXACTLY WHAT YOU ASK. NEVER WHAT YOU WANTED.
wishbane.name: WISHBANE

worldsplitter.lore: THE CRATERS HAVE OLDER SIBLINGS. THIS MADE THEM.
worldsplitter.name: WORLDSPLITTER

wrathflame.lore: LEGALLY, AND HE STRESSES THIS, NOT A FLAMETHROWER.
wrathflame.name: WRATHFLAME

arc_projector.description: A fork of blue-white current that refuses to stay in one target. The colony used it to jump-start rovers; it works on anything with a chassis.
arc_projector.name: ARC PROJECTOR

archmage_staff.description: A gnarled staff crowned with a crystal that predates the concept of physics. Every vanished magician of every folklore fell somewhere; some fell here, and dropped things.
archmage_staff.name: ARCHMAGE STAFF

atomic_raygun.description: An atomic-age lab prototype, all fins and chrome, straight off a pulp cover. Whoever built it believed the future would be wonderful. It ended up here, shooting at ghosts.
atomic_raygun.name: ATOMIC RAYGUN

auto_shotgun.description: From the HQ armory nobody asked why a rocket company needed. Slow, brutal, short — the building's hardest single argument.
auto_shotgun.name: AUTO SHOTGUN

basilisk_sprayer.description: The medicine wagon's pride: a fan of corrosive vials, three per squeeze. Cures nothing, dissolves most things, exactly as advertised in the small print.
basilisk_sprayer.name: BASILISK SPRAYER

berserker_axe.description: The hooded era's argument-ender. Its owner did steady work in an unsteady century, until one morning the cart to the scaffold simply never arrived.
berserker_axe.name: BERSERKER AXE

blaster.description: The printed polymer sidearm out of the garage ship's emergency locker. It is the weapon of last resort, and it knows it: slow, steady, and impossible to break.
blaster.name: BLASTER

blue_screen.description: BUILD GATES's tablet. It crashes whatever it is pointed at — which the colony's operating system does anyway; this just chooses the target.
blue_screen.name: BLUE SCREEN

blunderbuss.description: The shotgun's flared-brass great-grandfather, loaded with whatever fit down the muzzle — gravel, nails, a spare button. Its last owner vanished off a ship's manifest in 1721.
blunderbuss.name: BLUNDERBUSS

box_cutter.description: Off a shipping desk on the SpaceZ floor, still smelling of packing tape. It cut ten thousand boxes of engine parts before it ever met anything that bled.
box_cutter.name: BOX CUTTER

branding_iron.description: The cattle bench's plasma brand. It marks ownership at molecular depth — PUTAIN's park brands everything it considers its property, which was rather the problem.
branding_iron.name: PLASMA BRANDING IRON

brass_knuckles.description: A gift from an uncle who said the block was getting rough. He was right, eventually — just not about which block. Each punch lands like a dropped engine, then asks for a long breath.
brass_knuckles.name: BRASS KNUCKLES

busted_flamethrower.description: Not a flamethrower, and now not even that — the tank is empty and the igniter is a souvenir. The receipt says non-refundable.
busted_flamethrower.name: NOT-A-FLAMETHROWER (EMPTY)

calibration_probe.description: A developer's calibration tool that somehow shipped in the box. The red markers on tip and base line a swing up perfectly, for anyone who needs their violence unit-tested.
calibration_probe.name: CALIBRATION PROBE

ceramic_cutter.description: Off a shipping desk on the SpaceZ floor, still smelling of packing tape. It cut ten thousand boxes of engine parts before it ever met anything that bled.
ceramic_cutter.name: CERAMIC CUTTER

coilgun_repeater.description: A lever rifle on a maglev rail, from the gunsmith's window on Main Street — where every gun is a prop until the day the props stop pretending.
coilgun_repeater.name: COILGUN REPEATER

combat_knife.description: Sold as tactical, bought for opening paint cans. It has never been sharpened and has never needed it. Fast, short, and honest about both.
combat_knife.name: COMBAT KNIFE

combat_shotgun.description: From the HQ armory nobody asked why a rocket company needed. Slow, brutal, short — the building's hardest single argument.
combat_shotgun.name: COMBAT SHOTGUN

contrarian_dagger.description: PETER SEAL's letter opener: short, fast, and always against the crowd. He backed the colony before it was cool, and armed himself for when it stopped being cool.
contrarian_dagger.name: CONTRARIAN DAGGER

core_drill.description: THE PROSPECTOR's tunneler, from digging Site T on the far side. It chews rock, and it kept chewing after the crates coming up started breathing.
core_drill.name: CORE DRILL

cosmic_raygun.description: An atomic-age lab prototype, all fins and chrome, straight off a pulp cover. Whoever built it believed the future would be wonderful. It ended up here, shooting at ghosts.
cosmic_raygun.name: COSMIC RAYGUN

cyber_katana.description: Angular, allegedly shatterproof, shipped before testing finished — MOSQUE's personal brand, folded into a blade. The launch event said it would change everything. It cuts fine.
cyber_katana.name: CYBER KATANA

cybervan_wiper.description: A wiper blade off the angular armored van that was going to change everything. It detached during the shatterproof-window demo and has been merchandise ever since.
cybervan_wiper.name: CYBERVAN WIPER BLADE

dragon_blunderbuss.description: The shotgun's flared-brass great-grandfather, loaded with whatever fit down the muzzle — gravel, nails, a spare button. Its last owner vanished off a ship's manifest in 1721.
dragon_blunderbuss.name: DRAGON BLUNDERBUSS

eldritch_staff.description: A gnarled staff crowned with a crystal that predates the concept of physics. Every vanished magician of every folklore fell somewhere; some fell here, and dropped things.
eldritch_staff.name: ELDRITCH STAFF

ember_wand.description: A knotted wand crowned with a live flame that has not gone out in four hundred years. The trials burned a great many innocents; the one guilty party got away — mostly.
ember_wand.name: EMBER WAND

executioners_axe.description: The hooded era's argument-ender. Its owner did steady work in an unsteady century, until one morning the cart to the scaffold simply never arrived.
executioners_axe.name: EXECUTIONER'S AXE

executive_putter.description: THE NIGHT MANAGER's back-nine special, kept behind the desk for the quiet hours. HQ has no golf course; the night shift has other uses for a well-balanced club.
executive_putter.name: EXECUTIVE PUTTER

falcata.description: A legionary's short sword, still keen after two thousand years somewhere that didn't have years. Its owner marched into the fog past the frontier and out of history.
falcata.name: FALCATA

fire_extinguisher.description: Ten years on the garage wall beside the half-built ship it was meant to protect. The night Ada didn't come back he took it down, checked the gauge, and pointed it at his old employer. The spray argues with a whole crowd at once.
fire_extinguisher.name: FIRE EXTINGUISHER

flare_gun.description: The MISSION SPECIALIST's survival-kit piece. On a dead moon nobody is coming to answer a flare — so he learned to fire it at things instead.
flare_gun.name: FLARE GUN

flight_model_laser.description: A lab-bench rig three review meetings short of approval. The safety interlock is a strip of duct tape, which technically counts as a design freeze.
flight_model_laser.name: FLIGHT-MODEL LASER

fusion_brand.description: The cattle bench's plasma brand. It marks ownership at molecular depth — PUTAIN's park brands everything it considers its property, which was rather the problem.
fusion_brand.name: FUSION BRAND

gauss_rifle.description: Twin rails and a capacitor bank off a colony fabricator. The slug refuses to stop at the first body; on a planet run by machines, efficiency is a virtue.
gauss_rifle.name: GAUSS RIFLE

geiger_wand.description: The QUARANTINE MEDIC's screening probe, clicking well past the safe band. Whatever it measured on the crews that came home, the charts were filed twice.
geiger_wand.name: GEIGER WAND

genius_pistol.description: Printed overnight by the colony AI: white ceramic, no visible trigger. The darts do the aiming — the machines long ago stopped trusting humans with even that.
genius_pistol.name: GENIUS PISTOL

geology_hammer.description: A geologist's pick hammer from the sample runs. It was made to open rocks that kept secrets; on this moon, the rocks aren't the only ones.
geology_hammer.name: GEOLOGY HAMMER

gladius.description: A legionary's short sword, still keen after two thousand years somewhere that didn't have years. Its owner marched into the fog past the frontier and out of history.
gladius.name: GLADIUS

glorious_axe.description: The hooded era's argument-ender. Its owner did steady work in an unsteady century, until one morning the cart to the scaffold simply never arrived.
glorious_axe.name: GLORIOUS AXE

golden_stapler.description: The CEO's desk ornament: solid gold and, somehow, the best stapler in the building. Awarded for record quarterly efficiencies — the kind that emptied the hero's whole block.
golden_stapler.name: GOLDEN STAPLER

graviton_maw.description: A black housing cupping a well of bent space, printed overnight by the colony AI. Nothing about it appears in any human patent database, which is the point.
graviton_maw.name: GRAVITON MAW

gravity_maul.description: A black cube floating on a handle. Swinging it moves the ground more than the arm — the machines design better weapons than we ever did, and this is their exclamation mark.
gravity_maul.name: GRAVITY MAUL

hairy_potters_wand.description: A licensed replica wand from a franchise that settled out of court. Somewhere between the injection molding and the discount bin it started actually working — one thin bolt at a time, from a safe distance.
hairy_potters_wand.name: HAIRY POTTER'S WAND

hand_mortar.description: The shotgun's flared-brass great-grandfather, loaded with whatever fit down the muzzle — gravel, nails, a spare button. Its last owner vanished off a ship's manifest in 1721.
hand_mortar.name: HAND MORTAR

high_noon.description: The control center's sun-gun: a captured noon, released one blinding bolt at a time. ZAI runs the park's daylight on a schedule, and this is where the schedule is kept.
high_noon.name: HIGH NOON

horizon_maw.description: A black housing cupping a well of bent space, printed overnight by the colony AI. Nothing about it appears in any human patent database, which is the point.
horizon_maw.name: EVENT HORIZON MAW

hydraulic_wrench.description: The landers' chunky chrome service wrench, ferried up in the 70s and never ferried back. Half a century in the dust hasn't loosened a single bolt of it.
hydraulic_wrench.name: HYDRAULIC WRENCH

inferno_wand.description: A knotted wand crowned with a live flame that has not gone out in four hundred years. The trials burned a great many innocents; the one guilty party got away — mostly.
inferno_wand.name: INFERNO WAND

ion_peacemaker.description: The park's signature sidearm: a six-shooter with a plasma cylinder, printed by ZAI fabricators to look like the frontier and shoot like the future.
ion_peacemaker.name: ION PEACEMAKER

longbow.description: An English yew warbow, lost with its archer on the way to a battle the muster rolls record him missing from. The rift kept the string dry.
longbow.name: LONGBOW

lunar_wrench.description: The landers' chunky chrome service wrench, ferried up in the 70s and never ferried back. Half a century in the dust hasn't loosened a single bolt of it.
lunar_wrench.name: LUNAR WRENCH

machete.description: ARMSTRONG's yield, kept fifty years beside the flag. What the first man on the moon needed a machete for is a question the mission reports decline to answer.
machete.name: MACHETE

maglev_repeater.description: A lever rifle on a maglev rail, from the gunsmith's window on Main Street — where every gun is a prop until the day the props stop pretending.
maglev_repeater.name: MAGLEV REPEATER

magnetar_rod.description: A survey rod that ticks out a bright pulse the Apollo crews swore was answering something under the dust. The mission logs say instrument error. The instrument disagrees, on a steady beat.
magnetar_rod.name: MAGNETAR ROD

magnum_revolver.description: A .38 out of an Apollo crew survival kit — the space race packed for the worst, and the worst turned out to be patient.
magnum_revolver.name: MAGNUM REVOLVER

marksman_rifle.description: Military surplus that hitched a ride up in a crate marked SCIENTIFIC EQUIPMENT. One deliberate tracer at a time, and the round doesn't stop at the first body.
marksman_rifle.name: MARKSMAN RIFLE

maser_lance.description: The break-room magnetron, rebuilt into a sidearm by someone in R&D with strong feelings about shared appliances. It reheats a target in about a second and a half.
maser_lance.name: MASER LANCE

mass_driver.description: Twin rails and a capacitor bank off a colony fabricator. The slug refuses to stop at the first body; on a planet run by machines, efficiency is a virtue.
mass_driver.name: MASS DRIVER

match_pistol.description: From a desk drawer in middle management. This is America, even in the space business: the pistol was standard, the paperwork optional.
match_pistol.name: MATCH PISTOL

medieval_sword.description: A renaissance-faire souvenir that turned out to be real steel. It hung over the couch for years — movie nights, takeout, Ada laughing at it — until the night it came down off the wall.
medieval_sword.name: MEDIEVAL SWORD

meteor_hammer.description: A geologist's pick hammer from the sample runs. It was made to open rocks that kept secrets; on this moon, the rocks aren't the only ones.
meteor_hammer.name: METEOR HAMMER

microwave_emitter.description: The break-room magnetron, rebuilt into a sidearm by someone in R&D with strong feelings about shared appliances. It reheats a target in about a second and a half.
microwave_emitter.name: MICROWAVE EMITTER

midnight_sun.description: The control center's sun-gun: a captured noon, released one blinding bolt at a time. ZAI runs the park's daylight on a schedule, and this is where the schedule is kept.
midnight_sun.name: MIDNIGHT SUN

mono_cutter.description: Off a shipping desk on the SpaceZ floor, still smelling of packing tape. It cut ten thousand boxes of engine parts before it ever met anything that bled.
mono_cutter.name: MONO-EDGE CUTTER

mono_wire_lariat.description: A monomolecular lasso off the host-wrangling bench — the widest rope in the west. The park used it to catch malfunctioning cattle, and everything in Eastworld is cattle eventually.
mono_wire_lariat.name: MONO-WIRE LARIAT

moons_blade.description: A blade of regolith glass and lander scrap, ground sharp over fifty patient years. The moon remembers, and some of what it remembers has an edge.
moons_blade.name: MOON'S BLADE

neutron_maul.description: A black cube floating on a handle. Swinging it moves the ground more than the arm — the machines design better weapons than we ever did, and this is their exclamation mark.
neutron_maul.name: NEUTRON MAUL

nine_mm.description: From a desk drawer in middle management. This is America, even in the space business: the pistol was standard, the paperwork optional.
nine_mm.name: 9MM PISTOL

not_a_flamethrower.description: Dropped by MOSQUE as he bolted for the rift. Legally — and he stresses this — it is not a flamethrower. Legally, what it does to a corridor is not arson.
not_a_flamethrower.name: NOT-A-FLAMETHROWER

nova_peacemaker.description: The park's signature sidearm: a six-shooter with a plasma cylinder, printed by ZAI fabricators to look like the frontier and shoot like the future.
nova_peacemaker.name: NOVA PEACEMAKER

oracle_pistol.description: Printed overnight by the colony AI: white ceramic, no visible trigger. The darts do the aiming — the machines long ago stopped trusting humans with even that.
oracle_pistol.name: ORACLE PISTOL

overclocked_laser.description: DR. NOVA's conference pointer, overclocked three safety screws past legal. It was built to highlight slides about the thing dug out of the Sea of Tranquility; it burns holes in nearer problems too.
overclocked_laser.name: OVERCLOCKED LASER

phase_emitter.description: The break-room magnetron, rebuilt into a sidearm by someone in R&D with strong feelings about shared appliances. It reheats a target in about a second and a half.
phase_emitter.name: PHASE EMITTER

pilot_run_laser.description: A lab-bench rig three review meetings short of approval. The safety interlock is a strip of duct tape, which technically counts as a design freeze.
pilot_run_laser.name: PILOT-RUN LASER

plasma_blade.description: A humming magenta edge that cauterizes as it cuts. The colony's fabricators offer six ergonomic grips, designed by machines for the human hands they were replacing.
plasma_blade.name: PLASMA BLADE

plasma_claymore.description: A humming magenta edge that cauterizes as it cuts. The colony's fabricators offer six ergonomic grips, designed by machines for the human hands they were replacing.
plasma_claymore.name: PLASMA CLAYMORE

plasma_cutter.description: Cleanroom tooling rated for rocket hulls, from the vault DOGE-1 guarded. It was built to open spaceships; everything between here and Ada is considerably softer.
plasma_cutter.name: PLASMA CUTTER

plasma_peacemaker.description: The park's signature sidearm: a six-shooter with a plasma cylinder, printed by ZAI fabricators to look like the frontier and shoot like the future.
plasma_peacemaker.name: PLASMA PEACEMAKER

plasma_saber.description: A humming magenta edge that cauterizes as it cuts. The colony's fabricators offer six ergonomic grips, designed by machines for the human hands they were replacing.
plasma_saber.name: PLASMA SABER

prairie_iron.description: A stage prop off the first host down, loaded with live rounds nobody told the actors about. The park's safety board was also a host.
prairie_iron.name: PRAIRIE IRON

prompt_injector.description: OPTIMUSK PRIME's sidearm. It injects a prompt and the target does the rest to itself. The machines' own trick, turned on whatever previous instructions were in the way.
prompt_injector.name: PROMPT INJECTOR

prototype_laser.description: A lab-bench rig three review meetings short of approval. The safety interlock is a strip of duct tape, which technically counts as a design freeze.
prototype_laser.name: PROTOTYPE LASER

pulsar_rod.description: A survey rod that ticks out a bright pulse the Apollo crews swore was answering something under the dust. The mission logs say instrument error. The instrument disagrees, on a steady beat.
pulsar_rod.name: PULSAR ROD

pump_shotgun.name: PUMP SHOTGUN

quasar_maul.name: QUASAR MAUL

quasar_rod.description: A survey rod that ticks out a bright pulse the Apollo crews swore was answering something under the dust. The mission logs say instrument error. The instrument disagrees, on a steady beat.
quasar_rod.name: QUASAR ROD

race_gun.name: RACE GUN

railgun.name: RAILGUN

railstorm_repeater.description: A lever rifle on a maglev rail, from the gunsmith's window on Main Street — where every gun is a prop until the day the props stop pretending.
railstorm_repeater.name: RAILSTORM REPEATER

ranger_revolver.description: A .38 out of an Apollo crew survival kit — the space race packed for the worst, and the worst turned out to be patient.
ranger_revolver.name: RANGER REVOLVER

razor_lariat.description: A monomolecular lasso off the host-wrangling bench — the widest rope in the west. The park used it to catch malfunctioning cattle, and everything in Eastworld is cattle eventually.
razor_lariat.name: RAZOR LARIAT

retro_raygun.description: An atomic-age lab prototype, all fins and chrome, straight off a pulp cover. Whoever built it believed the future would be wonderful. It ended up here, shooting at ghosts.
retro_raygun.name: RETRO RAYGUN

riot_baton.description: Telescoping issue for the HQ night watch, tuned for crowd work. The guards who carried it never expected the crowd to be their own night shift.
riot_baton.name: RIOT BATON

riot_taser.description: THE CHIEF OF SECURITY's issue model — the desk taser flashed at every badge check, running the export firmware the paperwork says doesn't exist.
riot_taser.name: RIOT TASER

scout_rifle.description: Military surplus that hitched a ride up in a crate marked SCIENTIFIC EQUIPMENT. One deliberate tracer at a time, and the round doesn't stop at the first body.
scout_rifle.name: SCOUT RIFLE

search_bar.description: LARRY WEBPAGE's crawler pole — a literal bar that searches the line ahead. Results in about 0.26 seconds, sponsored placements first.
search_bar.name: SEARCH BAR

security_baton.description: Telescoping issue for the HQ night watch, tuned for crowd work. The guards who carried it never expected the crowd to be their own night shift.
security_baton.name: SECURITY BATON

seismic_hammer.description: A geologist's pick hammer from the sample runs. It was made to open rocks that kept secrets; on this moon, the rocks aren't the only ones.
seismic_hammer.name: SEISMIC HAMMER

service_revolver.description: A .38 out of an Apollo crew survival kit — the space race packed for the worst, and the worst turned out to be patient.
service_revolver.name: SERVICE REVOLVER

shock_baton.description: Telescoping issue for the HQ night watch, tuned for crowd work. The guards who carried it never expected the crowd to be their own night shift.
shock_baton.name: SHOCK BATON

siege_bow.description: An English yew warbow, lost with its archer on the way to a battle the muster rolls record him missing from. The rift kept the string dry.
siege_bow.name: SIEGE BOW

singularity_cannon.description: GROK OMEGA's sidearm: it fires very small, very rude black holes. A superintelligence found the rift, told no one, and built this in case something in here needed silencing.
singularity_cannon.name: SINGULARITY CANNON

singularity_lasso.description: A monomolecular lasso off the host-wrangling bench — the widest rope in the west. The park used it to catch malfunctioning cattle, and everything in Eastworld is cattle eventually.
singularity_lasso.name: SINGULARITY LASSO

smart_pistol.description: Printed overnight by the colony AI: white ceramic, no visible trigger. The darts do the aiming — the machines long ago stopped trusting humans with even that.
smart_pistol.name: SMART PISTOL

snake_oil_sprayer.description: The medicine wagon's pride: a fan of corrosive vials, three per squeeze. Cures nothing, dissolves most things, exactly as advertised in the small print.
snake_oil_sprayer.name: SNAKE-OIL SPRAYER

soggy_cardboard_sword.description: The crown jewel of ELON MOSQUE's final estate: a marketing prop for a product that never shipped. It has been rained on.
soggy_cardboard_sword.name: SOGGY CARDBOARD SWORD

solar_noon.description: The control center's sun-gun: a captured noon, released one blinding bolt at a time. ZAI runs the park's daylight on a schedule, and this is where the schedule is kept.
solar_noon.name: SOLAR NOON

solar_wand.description: A knotted wand crowned with a live flame that has not gone out in four hundred years. The trials burned a great many innocents; the one guilty party got away — mostly.
solar_wand.name: SOLAR WAND

sorcerers_staff.name: SORCERER'S STAFF

spatha.description: A legionary's short sword, still keen after two thousand years somewhere that didn't have years. Its owner marched into the fog past the frontier and out of history.
spatha.name: SPATHA

starfall_brand.description: The cattle bench's plasma brand. It marks ownership at molecular depth — PUTAIN's park brands everything it considers its property, which was rather the problem.
starfall_brand.name: STARFALL BRAND

stick.description: A stick. It was leaning on the garage wall where the welder wasn't, and there was no time to shop around. It sweeps a wide, whippy arc that means almost nothing to anyone it hits.
stick.name: A STICK

storm_projector.description: A fork of blue-white current that refuses to stay in one target. The colony used it to jump-start rovers; it works on anything with a chassis.
storm_projector.name: STORM PROJECTOR

surplus_carbine.description: Military surplus that hitched a ride up in a crate marked SCIENTIFIC EQUIPMENT. One deliberate tracer at a time, and the round doesn't stop at the first body.
surplus_carbine.name: SURPLUS CARBINE

surveyors_pick.description: THE CARTOGRAPHER's stake hammer, driven at every corner of a grid he mapped twice. Heavy arcs, deep dents, precise to the centimeter.
surveyors_pick.name: SURVEYOR'S PICK

tempest_projector.description: A fork of blue-white current that refuses to stay in one target. The colony used it to jump-start rovers; it works on anything with a chassis.
tempest_projector.name: TEMPEST PROJECTOR

tesla_coil.description: NIKOLA TESLA's coil, surrendered as the current returned to it. Wireless power, exactly as promised, since 1943. They laughed. They are not laughing now.
tesla_coil.name: TESLA COIL

tidal_maw.description: A black housing cupping a well of bent space, printed overnight by the colony AI. Nothing about it appears in any human patent database, which is the point.
tidal_maw.name: TIDAL MAW

torque_wrench.description: The landers' chunky chrome service wrench, ferried up in the 70s and never ferried back. Half a century in the dust hasn't loosened a single bolt of it.
torque_wrench.name: TORQUE WRENCH

viper_oil_sprayer.name: VIPER-OIL SPRAYER

void_wand.description: A wand that washed up with the rift's first debris. It fires a piece of the dark between universes, and it is always slightly cold to hold.
void_wand.name: VOID WAND

war_bow.description: An English yew warbow, lost with its archer on the way to a battle the muster rolls record him missing from. The rift kept the string dry.
war_bow.name: WAR BOW

wet_floor_sign.description: THE JANITOR's halberd. Thirty years of mopping the same lab teaches a man reach, timing, and exactly where everyone slips.
wet_floor_sign.name: WET FLOOR SIGN
